markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review October performance and align on the November content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**October Performance:** 18 articles published. Organic traffic was flat week-over-week, but user engagement remained strong at 60–65%.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**November Strategy:** Prioritize content refreshes (GRC, ERM, Board & Governance) and merge competing posts to consolidate authority and reverse traffic decay.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**AI Content Focus:** Increase AI-related content to capitalize on high lead-gen (e.g., "AI board meeting" post) and rising traffic to the "AI-powered governance" pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**ESG Messaging Update:** Remove all links to Diligent's internal ESG solution and redirect to a new partner landing page to align with the updated product strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

## Topics

### October Performance Review

  - [**Content Output:** 18 articles published.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [**Context:** This volume is slightly below the 5 articles/week target, but a healthy review queue ensures the November schedule is on track.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [Traffic peaked in the second week of October, then remained flat week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [User engagement was strong, with a 60–65% engagement rate indicating sticky content.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**"Singapore air regulation"** → Strong organic and LLM traffic, likely due to end-of-year regulatory interest.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**"Importance of internal control"** → Mid-funnel topic showing strong performance.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Google Search Console (GSC) Queries:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Position 1:** Grew to \>6,600 queries.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Positions 2–10:** Grew from \>10,000 to \>11,000 queries.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Significance:** Strong growth in Position 1 queries is a key win, as this is a highly competitive space.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Lead Generation (Last-Click Attribution):**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**"The next era of governance"** → 17 leads.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [**"AI board meeting"** → Strong performance, validating the focus on AI topics.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**Pillar Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [All content pillars showed growth.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**"AI-powered governance"** → Fastest growth in sessions, correlating with high lead generation and validating the AI content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### November Content Strategy & Workflow

  - [**Content Calendar:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Priority 1: Refreshes.** Focus on ERM, GRC, Board & Governance, and Diligent 1 topics.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [**Priority 2: Merges.** Consolidate competing posts to reverse traffic decay.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
          - [**Example:** Merge "Why are meeting minutes important" and "Minutes and post meetings" to create one authoritative piece.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Goal:** Fill the content calendar through early January.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Workflow Adjustments:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Batch Approvals:** GrowthX will send topics in larger batches (\~30) to streamline Diligent's review process.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Holiday Season:** GrowthX will send more content now to build a queue for the slower holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**OOTO Coverage:** Diligent will arrange internal coverage for SEO reviews during the week of Nov 17.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### Strategic Initiatives

  - [**ESG Messaging Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Action:** Remove all links to Diligent's internal ESG solution (e.g., carbon accounting).](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Redirect:** Point all ESG-related links to a new partner landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns content with the updated product strategy and partner relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Note:** General ESG guides will remain, with CTAs updated to be non-product-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [**AI Content & LLM Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Action:** Conduct an audit of LLM outputs (e.g., ChatGPT) to identify and correct inaccurate information.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures LLMs reflect current product offerings and AI features, not outdated content (e.g., "Governance Cloud").](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis (OnBoard):**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [**Context:** Diligent previously overtook OnBoard for share of voice on \~3,000 terms. OnBoard may now be investing heavily to regain ground.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will perform a keyword gap analysis to find new opportunities and maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [**Q1 2025 Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Priority:** Ramp up content on core governance terms again.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To counter potential competitor moves and address content decay in older governance pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Send the next batch of \~30 topics for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Merge the two competing meeting minutes posts.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [Conduct a keyword gap analysis against OnBoard.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
      - [Perform the LLM content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**Diligent:**](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [Provide the new partner landing page URL for ESG redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Arrange internal coverage for SEO reviews during the week of Nov 17.](https://fathom.video/share/NC4npuC3PKk5mcjsTPv_yS4N3p6ks--t?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
